'''鈭歴h-f-m''' ('''shafama''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:alienate|alienate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-f-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:alienate|alienate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-f-m
|-
! Lemma
| shafama
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shafamithi|shafamithi]] || [[word:shafamiji|shafamiji]] || [[word:shafamishi|shafamishi]] || [[word:shafami|shafami]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shafamuthuth|shafamuthuth]] || [[word:shafamujuj|shafamujuj]] || [[word:shafamushush|shafamushush]] || [[word:shafam|shafam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shafamuthu|shafamuthu]] || [[word:shafamuju|shafamuju]] || [[word:shafamushu|shafamushu]] || [[word:shafamu|shafamu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shafamufuth|shafamufuth]] || [[word:shafamufuj|shafamufuj]] || [[word:shafamufush|shafamufush]] || [[word:shafamuf|shafamuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shafamethe|shafamethe]] || [[word:shafameje|shafameje]] || [[word:shafameshe|shafameshe]] || [[word:shafame|shafame]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shafamothoth|shafamothoth]] || [[word:shafamojoj|shafamojoj]] || [[word:shafamoshosh|shafamoshosh]] || [[word:shafam|shafam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shafamotho|shafamotho]] || [[word:shafamojo|shafamojo]] || [[word:shafamosho|shafamosho]] || [[word:shafamo|shafamo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shafamofoth|shafamofoth]] || [[word:shafamofoj|shafamofoj]] || [[word:shafamofosh|shafamofosh]] || [[word:shafamof|shafamof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shafam忙th忙|shafam忙th忙]] || [[word:shafam忙j忙|shafam忙j忙]] || [[word:shafam忙sh忙|shafam忙sh忙]] || [[word:shafam忙|shafam忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shafamathath|shafamathath]] || [[word:shafamajaj|shafamajaj]] || [[word:shafamashash|shafamashash]] || [[word:shafam|shafam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shafamatha|shafamatha]] || [[word:shafamaja|shafamaja]] || [[word:shafamasha|shafamasha]] || [[word:shafama|shafama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shafamafath|shafamafath]] || [[word:shafamafaj|shafamafaj]] || [[word:shafamafash|shafamafash]] || [[word:shafamaf|shafamaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:shafamasha|shafamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafamasha|goshafamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafamasha|gokishafamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:shafamn眉sha|shafamn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafamnkn眉sha|goshafamnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafamn眉sha|gokishafamn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafamsh毛sha|shafamsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafamnksh毛sha|goshafamnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafamsh毛sha|gokishafamsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafamrosha|shafamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafamnkrosha|goshafamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafamrosha|gokishafamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafamusha|shafamusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafamnkmusha|goshafamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafamusha|gokishafamusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafamsherasha|shafamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafamnksherasha|goshafamnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafamsherasha|gokishafamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafamngasha|shafamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafamnkngasha|goshafamnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafamngasha|gokishafamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafamyasha|shafamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafamnkyasha|goshafamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafamyasha|gokishafamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafamyamasha|shafamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafamnkyamasha|goshafamnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafamyamasha|gokishafamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafamn眉sh毛sha|shafamn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafamnkn眉sh毛sha|goshafamnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafamn眉sh毛sha|gokishafamn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafamn眉rosha|shafamn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafamnkn眉rosha|goshafamnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafamn眉rosha|gokishafamn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafamn眉musha|shafamn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafamnkn眉musha|goshafamnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafamn眉musha|gokishafamn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafamsh毛n眉sha|shafamsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafamnksh毛n眉sha|goshafamnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafamsh毛n眉sha|gokishafamsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafamsh毛rosha|shafamsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafamnksh毛rosha|goshafamnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafamsh毛rosha|gokishafamsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafamsh毛musha|shafamsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafamnksh毛musha|goshafamnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafamsh毛musha|gokishafamsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafamron眉sha|shafamron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafamnkron眉sha|goshafamnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafamron眉sha|gokishafamron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafamrosh毛sha|shafamrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafamnkrosh毛sha|goshafamnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafamrosh毛sha|gokishafamrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafamromusha|shafamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafamnkromusha|goshafamnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafamromusha|gokishafamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafamun眉sha|shafamun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafamnkmun眉sha|goshafamnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafamun眉sha|gokishafamun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafamush毛sha|shafamush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafamnkmush毛sha|goshafamnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafamush毛sha|gokishafamush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafamurosha|shafamurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafamnkmurosha|goshafamnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafamurosha|gokishafamurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:shafam|shafam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:sh忙f忙m|sh忙f忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoshafam|hoshafam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hosh忙f忙m|hosh忙f忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoshafam|hohoshafam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosh忙f忙m|hohosh忙f忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉shafam|n眉shafam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉sh忙f忙m|n眉sh忙f忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉shafam|n眉n眉shafam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉sh忙f忙m|n眉n眉sh忙f忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂shafam|n茂shafam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂sh忙f忙m|n茂sh忙f忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂shafam|n茂n茂shafam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂sh忙f忙m|n茂n茂sh忙f忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lushafam|lushafam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lush忙f忙m|lush忙f忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulushafam|lulushafam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulush忙f忙m|lulush忙f忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lishafam|lishafam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lish忙f忙m|lish忙f忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilishafam|lilishafam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilish忙f忙m|lilish忙f忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koshafam|koshafam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kosh忙f忙m|kosh忙f忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoshafam|kokoshafam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosh忙f忙m|kokosh忙f忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keshafam|keshafam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kesh忙f忙m|kesh忙f忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeshafam|kekeshafam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesh忙f忙m|kekesh忙f忙m]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
